name: Apple Cream Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 6 Granny Smith apples, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place noodles in a 11 x 7 inch baking dish. Cover with warm water and soak for 20 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. Meanwhile, melt 1/4 cup margarine in a saucepan over medium heat. Add apples and cook, covered, for 10 minutes or until tender, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and stir in packed brown sugar, pecans, and cinnamon. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese with egg and vanilla until light and fluffy. Fold in whipped cream.
4. Melt remaining butter. Combine breadcrumbs, granulated sugar, and melted butter in a small bowl.
5. Spread half of the apple mixture in the bottom of the baking dish. Layer with 3 noodles. Spread with half of the cream cheese mixture. Layer with 3 more noodles.
6. Spread with remaining apple mixture and layer with last three noodles.
7. Top with remaining cream mixture and sprinkle with breadcrumb mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Let stand 20 minutes before serving.
